[[File:Exozone1.jpg|thumb|left|260px|Boba Fett, Mako Spince, Dengar, and Exozone pursue Han Solo and Leia Organa Solo on nar Shaddaa.]]
{{Quote|Great! Every Bounty Hunter in town is Joining the fun!|Han Solo|<ref name="Dark Empire 4">[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Exozone''' was an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] that sometimes worked with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]. During the events surrounding the return of the resurrected [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] helped the other bounty hunters chase [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] through the streets of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

During the pursuit of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], Exozone wore a [[Blast helmet/Legends|Blast helmet]], full body armor, was armed with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|Blaster rifle]] and a long machete-like blade. He was unsuccessful in stopping the Solos being unable to score a hit on his quick-thinking, fast-moving opponents.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
